rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code homestead exemption amounts; Elec. Code §11.004 governs voting in a former precinct after moving. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A registered voter who changes residence to another election precinct in the same county, if otherwise eligible, may vote a full ballot in the election precinct of former residence
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
